message:
🎨 Use actual KubeStellar logo on dark background for PWA icon (#528)

* ✨ Make widget stat blocks clickable to navigate to console

Each stat block now opens the relevant page in full console:
- Clusters → /clusters
- GPUs → /compute?card=gpu_overview
- Nodes Offline → /nodes
- Pod Issues → /pods?card=pod_issues
- Nodes → /nodes
- Status → /dashboard

Issue list items also clickable to search for specific pod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add native macOS notifications for offline nodes

- Send desktop notification when nodes go offline
- Request notification permission on widget load
- Notification shows node names and count
- Uses requireInteraction to keep notification visible
- Tag prevents duplicate notifications
- Also fix: open links in system browser instead of PWA

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Clarify Chrome PWA install must be from /widget page

Add warning message to help users understand they need to install from
the /widget page to get the mini-dashboard widget instead of the full console.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 Add PWA icon with dark background

Create proper square PWA icons (192x192 and 512x512) with dark slate
background matching the app theme. Fixes white background issue on
macOS dock icons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 Use actual KubeStellar logo on dark background for PWA icon

Replace generated hexagon with the actual KubeStellar logo SVG
centered on a dark slate (#0f172a) background for proper dock
icon appearance on macOS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="KubeStellar" />
-    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/kubestellar-logo.svg" />
+    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/pwa-icon-192.png" />
     <title>KubeStellar Console</title>
   </head>
   <body>

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
+  <!-- Dark background -->
+  <rect width="512" height="512" rx="80" fill="#0f172a"/>
+
+  <!-- KubeStellar logo centered with padding -->
+  <image x="56" y="56" width="400" height="400" xlink:href="/kubestellar-logo.svg"/>
+</svg>
